---
title: "Indicadores del Mercado Cambiario Dominicano"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
  fig-height: 4
---

----

```{r setup}

options(box.path = here::here())
source(here::here("scripts/eda_tc.R"))
```


::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-md-6 .g-col-12}

```{r "TC marcado spot"}
plot_tc_spot
```

:::

::: {.g-col-md-6 .g-col-12}
```{r "Variacion acumulada"}
 
tasa_acumulada
```
:::

::: {.g-col-md-6 .g-col-12}
```{r "Margen promedio"}
#| fig-height: 3

plot_margen_promedio
```
:::


::: {.g-col-md-6 .g-col-12}

### Tasas en los principales bancos

```{r "Table tc bancos"}
tabla_tc
```
:::

:::

<style>
  h1 {
    text-align: center;
  }
  h3 {
    color: #333333;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 400;
    text-align: center;
    fill: #333333;
    margin: 5px 0 10px 0;
  }
</style>
